examples: He grandly declared that "international politics is a struggle for power."
He described himself grandly as a 'landscape architect'.
Lucille's home was very grandly called a chateau, though in truth it was nothing more than a large farm.
No physical object more grandly symbolizes Chinese accomplishments than the Great Wall of China.
Mr. McAuliffe grandly unveiled his signature MyCar last July at a rock-star event attended by Messrs.
